To avoid exhaustion, UDP sockets will be connected and associated with\\n478:   //       a 4-tuple including the local IP, and the UDP port may be reused for multiple\\n479:   //       connections unless use_original_src_ip_ is set. When use_original_src_ip_ is set, the\\n480:   //       socket should not be connected since the source IP will be changed.\\n481:   // NOTE: We do not specify the local IP to use for the sendmsg call if use_original_src_ip_ is not\\n482:   //       set. We allow the OS to select the right IP based on outbound routing rules if\\n483:   //       use_original_src_ip_ is not set, else use downstream peer IP as local IP.\\n484:   if (!connected_ && !use_original_src_ip_) {\\n485:     Api::SysCallIntResult rc = udp_socket_->ioHandle().connect(host_->address());\\n486:     if (SOCKET_FAILURE(rc.return_value_)) {\\n487:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"cannot connect: ({}) {}\\\", rc.errno_, errorDetails(rc.errno_));\\n488:       cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_errors_.inc();\\n489:       return;\\n490:     }\\n491: \\n492:     connected_ = true;\\n493:   }\\n494: \\n495:   ASSERT((connected_ || use_original_src_ip_) && udp_socket_ && host_);\\n496: \\n497:   const uint64_t tx_buffer_length = data.buffer_->length();\\n498:   ENVOY_LOG(trace, \\\"writing {} byte datagram upstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\\\",\\n499:             tx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\\n500:             host_->address()->asStringView());\\n501: \\n502:   const Network::Address::Ip* local_ip = use_original_src_ip_ ? addresses_.peer_->ip() : nullptr;\\n503:   Api::IoCallUint64Result rc = Network::Utility::writeToSocket(\\n504:       udp_socket_->ioHandle(), *data.buffer_, local_ip, *host_->address());\\n505: \\n506:   if (!rc.ok()) {\\n507:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_errors_.inc();\\n508:   } else {\\n509:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_datagrams_.inc();\\n510:     cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_tx_bytes_total_.add(tx_buffer_length);\\n511:   }\\n512: }\\n513: \\n514: bool UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onContinueFilterChain(ActiveReadFilter* filter) {\\n515:   ASSERT(filter != nullptr);\\n516: \\n517:   std::list<ActiveReadFilterPtr>::iterator entry = std::next(filter->entry());\\n518:   for (; entry != read_filters_.end(); entry++) {\\n519:     if (!(*entry)->read_filter_ || (*entry)->initialized_) {\\n520:       continue;\\n521:     }\\n522: \\n523:     (*entry)->initialized_ = true;\\n524:     auto status = (*entry)->read_filter_->onNewSession();\\n525:     if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\\n526:       return true;\\n527:     }\\n528:   }\\n529: \\n530:   if (!createUpstream()) {\\n531:     cluster_.removeSession(this);\\n532:     return false;\\n533:   }\\n534: \\n535:   return true;\\n536: }\\n537: \\n538: bool UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::createUpstream() {\\n539:   if (udp_socket_) {\\n540:     // A session filter may call on continueFilterChain(), after already creating the socket,\\n541:     // so we first check that the socket was not created already.\\n542:     return true;\\n543:   }\\n544: \\n545:   if (!host_) {\\n546:     host_ = cluster_.chooseHost(addresses_.peer_, &udp_session_info_);\\n547:     if (host_ == nullptr) {\\n548:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"cannot find any valid host.\\\");\\n549:       cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.inc();\\n550:       return false;\\n551:     }\\n552:   }\\n553: \\n554:   udp_session_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamHost(host_);\\n555:   cluster_.addSession(host_.get(), this);\\n556:   createUdpSocket(host_);\\n557:   return true;\\n558: }\\n559: \\n560: void UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::createUdpSocket(const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host) {\\n561:   // NOTE: The socket call can only fail due to memory/fd exhaustion. \n417: bool UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onNewSession() {\n418:   if (cluster_.filter_.config_->accessLogFlushInterval().has_value() &&\n419: To avoid exhaustion, UDP sockets will be connected and associated with\n478:   //       a 4-tuple including the local IP, and the UDP port may be reused for multiple\n479:   //       connections unless use_original_src_ip_ is set. When use_original_src_ip_ is set, the\n480:   //       socket should not be connected since the source IP will be changed.\n481:   // NOTE: We do not specify the local IP to use for the sendmsg call if use_original_src_ip_ is not\n482:   //       set. We allow the OS to select the right IP based on outbound routing rules if\n483:   //       use_original_src_ip_ is not set, else use downstream peer IP as local IP.\n484:   if (!connected_ && !use_original_src_ip_) {\n485:     Api::SysCallIntResult rc = udp_socket_->ioHandle().connect(host_->address());\n486:     if (SOCKET_FAILURE(rc.return_value_)) {\n487:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot connect: ({}) {}\", rc.errno_, errorDetails(rc.errno_));\n488:       cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_errors_.inc();\n489:       return;\n490:     }\n491: \n492:     connected_ = true;\n493:   }\n494: \n495:   ASSERT((connected_ || use_original_src_ip_) && udp_socket_ && host_);\n496: \n497:   const uint64_t tx_buffer_length = data.buffer_->length();\n498:   ENVOY_LOG(trace, \"writing {} byte datagram upstream: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n499:             tx_buffer_length, addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n500:             host_->address()->asStringView());\n501: \n502:   const Network::Address::Ip* local_ip = use_original_src_ip_ ? addresses_.peer_->ip() : nullptr;\n503:   Api::IoCallUint64Result rc = Network::Utility::writeToSocket(\n504:       udp_socket_->ioHandle(), *data.buffer_, local_ip, *host_->address());\n505: \n506:   if (!rc.ok()) {\n507:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_errors_.inc();\n508:   } else {\n509:     cluster_.cluster_stats_.sess_tx_datagrams_.inc();\n510:     cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_tx_bytes_total_.add(tx_buffer_length);\n511:   }\n512: }\n513: \n514: bool UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onContinueFilterChain(ActiveReadFilter* filter) {\n515:   ASSERT(filter != nullptr);\n516: \n517:   std::list<ActiveReadFilterPtr>::iterator entry = std::next(filter->entry());\n518:   for (; entry != read_filters_.end(); entry++) {\n519:     if (!(*entry)->read_filter_ || (*entry)->initialized_) {\n520:       continue;\n521:     }\n522: \n523:     (*entry)->initialized_ = true;\n524:     auto status = (*entry)->read_filter_->onNewSession();\n525:     if (status == ReadFilterStatus::StopIteration) {\n526:       return true;\n527:     }\n528:   }\n529: \n530:   if (!createUpstream()) {\n531:     cluster_.removeSession(this);\n532:     return false;\n533:   }\n534: \n535:   return true;\n536: }\n537: \n538: bool UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::createUpstream() {\n539:   if (udp_socket_) {\n540:     // A session filter may call on continueFilterChain(), after already creating the socket,\n541:     // so we first check that the socket was not created already.\n542:     return true;\n543:   }\n544: \n545:   if (!host_) {\n546:     host_ = cluster_.chooseHost(addresses_.peer_, &udp_session_info_);\n547:     if (host_ == nullptr) {\n548:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"cannot find any valid host.\");\n549:       cluster_.cluster_.info()->trafficStats()->upstream_cx_none_healthy_.inc();\n550:       return false;\n551:     }\n552:   }\n553: \n554:   udp_session_info_.upstreamInfo()->setUpstreamHost(host_);\n555:   cluster_.addSession(host_.get(), this);\n556:   createUdpSocket(host_);\n557:   return true;\n558: }\n559: \n560: void UdpProxyFilter::UdpActiveSession::createUdpSocket(const Upstream::HostConstSharedPtr& host) {\n561:   // NOTE: The socket call can only fail due to memory/fd exhaustion. No local ephemeral port\n562:   //       is bound until the first packet is sent to the upstream host.\n563:   udp_socket_ = cluster_.filter_.createUdpSocket(host);\n564:   udp_socket_->ioHandle().initializeFileEvent(\n565:       cluster_.filter_.read_callbacks_->udpListener().dispatcher(),\n566:       [this](uint32_t) { onReadReady(); }, Event::PlatformDefaultTriggerType,\n567:       Event::FileReadyType::Read);\n568: \n569:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"creating new session: downstream={} local={} upstream={}\",\n570:             addresses_.peer_->asStringView(), addresses_.local_->asStringView(),\n571:             host->address()->asStringView());\n572: \n573:   if (use_original_src_ip_) {\n574:     const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr socket_options =\n575:         Network::SocketOptionFactory::buildIpTransparentOptions();\n576:     const bool ok = Network::Socket::applyOptions(\n577:         socket_options, *udp_socket_, envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_PREBIND);\n578: \n579:     RELEASE_ASSERT(ok, \"Should never occur!\");\n580:     ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"The original src is enabled for address {}.\",\n581:               addresses_.peer_->asStringView());\n582:   }\n583: \n584:   // TODO(mattklein123): Enable dropped packets socket option. In general the Socket abstraction\n585:   // does not work well right now for client sockets. It's too heavy weight and is aimed at listener\n586:   // sockets. We need to figure out how to either refactor Socket into something that works better\n587:   // for this use case or allow the socket option abstractions to work directly against an IO\n588:   // handle.\n589: }\n590: \n591: void UdpProxyFilter::ActiveSession::onInjectReadDatagramToFilterChain(ActiveReadFilter* filter,\n592: config_->stats().downstream_sess_total_.value());\n  EXPECT_EQ(0, config_->stats().downstream_sess_active_.value());\n\n  filter_.reset();\n  EXPECT_EQ(output_.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_THAT(output_.front(), testing::HasSubstr(\"session_complete\"));\n}\n\nclass HttpUpstreamImplTest : public testing::Test {\npublic:\n  struct HeaderToAdd {\n    std::string key_;\n    std::string value_;\n  };\n\n  Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl\n  expectedHeaders(bool is_ssl = false, bool use_post = false,\n                  absl::optional<std::string> opt_authority = absl::nullopt,\n                  absl::optional<std::string> opt_path = absl::nullopt,\n                  absl::optional<HeaderToAdd> header_to_add = absl::nullopt) {\n    // In case connect-udp is used, Envoy expect the H2 headers to be normalized with H1,\n    // so expect that the request headers here match H1 headers, even though\n    // eventually H2 headers will be sent. When the headers are normalized to H1, the method\n    // is replaced with GET, a header with the 'upgrade' key is added with 'connect-udp'\n    // value and a header with the 'connection' key is added with 'Upgrade' value.\n    std::string scheme = is_ssl ? \"https\" : \"http\";\n    std::string authority =\n        opt_authority.has_value() ? opt_authority.value() : \"default.host.com:10\";\n    std::string method = use_post ? \"POST\" : \"GET\";\n    std::string path =\n        opt_path.has_value() ? opt_path.value() : \"/.well-known/masque/udp/default.target.host/20/\";\n\n    auto headers = Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl{\n        {\":scheme\", scheme}, {\":authority\", authority}, {\":method\", method}, {\":path\", path}};\n\n    if (!use_post) {\n      headers.addCopy(\"capsule-protocol\", \"?1\");\n      headers.addCopy(\"upgrade\", \"connect-udp\");\n      headers.addCopy(\"connection\", \"Upgrade\");\n    }\n\n    if (header_to_add) {\n      headers.addCopy(header_to_add.value().key_, header_to_add.value().value_);\n    }\n\n    return headers;\n  }\n\n  void setAndExpectRequestEncoder(Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl expected_headers,\n                                  bool is_ssl = false) {\n    EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, addCallbacks(_));\n    EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_, encodeHeaders(_, _))\n        .WillOnce(Invoke([expected_headers](const Http::RequestHeaderMap& headers,\n                                            bool end_stream) -> Http::Status {\n          EXPECT_THAT(&headers, HeaderMapEqualIgnoreOrder(&expected_headers));\n          EXPECT_FALSE(end_stream);\n          return absl::OkStatus();\n        }));\n\n    upstream_->setRequestEncoder(request_encoder_, is_ssl);\n\n    // Verify that resetEncoder is called only once.\n    EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_.stream_, removeCallbacks(_));\n  }\n\n  void filterStateOverride(absl::optional<uint32_t> proxy_port = absl::nullopt,\n                           absl::optional<uint32_t> target_port = absl::nullopt) {\n    if (proxy_port) {\n      stream_info_.filterState()->setData(\n          \"udp.connect.proxy_port\",\n          std::make_shared<StreamInfo::UInt32AccessorImpl>(proxy_port.value()),\n          Envoy::StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable);\n    }\n\n    if (target_port) {\n      stream_info_.filterState()->setData(\n          \"udp.connect.target_port\",\n          std::make_shared<StreamInfo::UInt32AccessorImpl>(target_port.value()),\n          Envoy::StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable);\n    }\n  }\n\n  void setup(absl::optional<HeaderToAdd> header_to_add = absl::nullopt) {\n    Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::core::v3::HeaderValueOption> headers_to_add;\n    if (header_to_add) {\n      envoy::config::core::v3::HeaderValueOption* header = headers_to_add.Add();\n      header->mutable_header()->set_key(header_to_add.value().key_);\n      header->mutable_header()->set_value(header_to_add.value().value_);\n    }\n\n    header_evaluator_ = Envoy::Router::HeaderParser::configure(headers_to_add);\n    config_ = std::make_unique<NiceMock<MockUdpTunnelingConfig>>(*header_evaluator_);\n    upstream_ = std::make_unique<HttpUpstreamImpl>(callbacks_, *config_, stream_info_);\n    upstream_->setTunnelCreationCallbacks(creation_callbacks_);\n  }\n\n  NiceMock<MockUpstreamTunnelCallbacks> callbacks_;\n  NiceMock<StreamInfo::MockStreamInfo> stream_info_;\n  NiceMock<Http::MockRequestEncoder> request_encoder_;\n  NiceMock<MockTunnelCreationCallbacks> creation_callbacks_;\n  std::unique_ptr<NiceMock<MockUdpTunnelingConfig>> config_;\n  std::unique_ptr<Http::HeaderEvaluator> header_evaluator_;\n  std::unique_ptr<HttpUpstreamImpl> upstream_;\n};\n\nTEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, EncodeData) {\n  setup();\n  setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(request_encoder_, encodeData(_, false));\n  Buffer::OwnedImpl data;\n  upstream_->encodeData(data);\n}\n\nTEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, WatermarksCallBack) {\n  setup();\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, onAboveWriteBufferHighWatermark());\n  upstream_->onAboveWriteBufferHighWatermark();\n  EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, onBelowWriteBufferLowWatermark());\n  upstream_->onBelowWriteBufferLowWatermark();\n}\n\nTEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, OnResetStream) {\n  setup();\n  setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n\n  // If the creation callbacks are active will resetting the stream, it means that response\n  // headers were not received, so it's expected to be a failure.\n  EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n  upstream_->onResetStream(Http::StreamResetReason::ConnectionTimeout, \"reason\");\n}\n\nTEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, LocalCloseByDownstreamResetsStream) {\n  setup();\n setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n\n  Buffer::OwnedImpl data;\n\n  // Second decodeData call will reset the stream, because it is end of stream.\n  // Since response headers were not received it's considered as a failure.\n  EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure());\n  EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, onUpstreamData(_, _))\n      .WillOnce(Invoke([](Buffer::Instance&, bool end_stream) { EXPECT_FALSE(end_stream); }))\n      .WillOnce(Invoke([](Buffer::Instance&, bool end_stream) { EXPECT_TRUE(end_stream); }));\n\n  upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeData(data, /*end_stream=*/false);\n  upstream_->responseDecoder().decodeData(data, /*end_stream=*/true);\n}\n\nTEST_F(HttpUpstreamImplTest, DecodeDataAfterSuccessHeaders) {\n  setup();\n  setAndExpectRequestEncoder(expectedHeaders());\n\n  Buffer::OwnedImpl data;\n  Http::ResponseHeaderMapPtr response_headers(\n      new Http::TestResponseHeaderMapImpl{{\":status\", \"101\"}, {\"upgrade\", \"connect-udp\"}});\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamFailure()).Times(0);\n  EXPECT_CALL(creation_callbacks_, onStreamSuccess(_));\n  EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_,
